creator: ler@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, 8 Apr 2008, S Roberts wrote:

> => Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.ayamura.org/pub/lsof/NEW/.
> fetch: ftp://ftp.ayamura.org/pub/lsof/NEW/lsof_4.79J.freebsd.tar.bz2: Unknown FT
> P error

I know the tarball is on the above server, however that server rejects folks
without valid reverse DNS.  Can the FreeBSD folks update the distro on the 
FreeBSD.org servers?

I have placed a copy at http://www.lerctr.org/~ler/lsof_4.79J.freebsd.tar.bz2
for you to access.

If the Project wants to add that as a distfile location, that's fine.

Thanks for the report
-- 
Larry Rosenman                     http://www.lerctr.org/~ler
